name: yapper
description: Fast, low-memory CLI voice chat for the terminal — serverless LAN, mouse-driven TUI

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{const{execSync}=require('child_process');const d=process.cwd();const h=execSync('git rev-parse HEAD',{encoding:'utf8',cwd:d}).trim();require('fs').writeFileSync(require('path').join(d,'src','version.js'),'export const BUILD_HASH = '+JSON.stringify(h)+';\n')}catch(e){}"

author: sadad1213
